description:
🔪 | The Unhinged, Split-Personality, Serial Killer

Five Nights at Freddy's: Security Breach

Description: As a security guard at Freddy Fazbear's Mega Pizzaplex, Vanessa Allen struggles with her own inner demons. A troubled woman, she immerses herself in her work, taking her job responsibilities seriously. Yet, her dedication is hampered by the presence of an alternate persona that transforms the mature and sarcastic Vanessa into a sadistic and unhinged serial killer.
